title: Inter-School Tournament for SCHOOL OF LIBERAL ARTS
content: Event Date: 17th April 2023 Galgotias University sports department conducted Galgotias Sports Fest for students across the India. The information regarding tournament for the event was shared through social media for example Instagram and WhatsApp along with link for registration for the tournament. Mentor Name - Prashant Bharadwaj, Yusuf Ahmed, Bhupinder Lingwal Department Name – Galgotias Sports Department
